steps.title: Match the singular subject
steps.content: The sentence needs a main verb for the subject He. Because the subject is third-person singular and the sentence describes a typical action, the verb must be a finite present-tense form.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice A is an infinitive phrase, not a main verb. Choice C is also an infinitive. Choice D is a participle that cannot serve as the main verb by itself. The answer is B.
